home.heroSubtitle: DomUnity takes care of your entrance – administrative, financial, and technical management with total transparency for every resident.
home.aboutSubtitle: A suitable solution for both already organized condominiums and new buildings currently choosing a professional manager.
home.aboutCard1Desc: Access to real-time balances, payment history, and all building expenses in one place – without paper receipts and disputes.
home.aboutCard1Bullet3: Notifications for delays and new fees
home.aboutCard2Desc: A professional system for managing multiple entrances, buildings, and complexes – with automated reports and centralized communication.
home.aboutCard2Bullet1: Financial reports by entrance and building
home.servicesSubtitle: Full condominium service – from documentation to daily maintenance and resident communication.
home.serviceAdminDesc: Organization of general meetings, protocols, registers, and correspondence.
home.serviceFinanceDesc: Fee collection, cost distribution, and transparent reporting.
home.serviceMaintenanceDesc: Repairs, preventive maintenance, lighting, and general care.
home.serviceCleaningDesc: Professional cleaning of entrances and common areas on schedule.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three clear steps to an organized and peaceful building.
home.step1Desc: Send us building information – entrances, apartments, specifics. Receive a personalized proposal.
home.step2Desc: We clarify services, schedules, and communication channels. Every owner gets a DomUnity profile.
home.step3Desc: We take over the administrative, financial, and technical tasks while you track everything online.
home.advantagesDesc: We combine professional management with modern software so every fee, repair, and decision is trackable and clear to everyone.
home.advBullet1: Transparent reports for every building and entrance
home.advBoxDesc: Contact us for a meeting or send a request for a specific quote for your building.

services.pageSubtitle: Select a service to see detailed information. Everything is organized and transparent – for both the manager and the residents.
services.contentAdminIntro: We manage the documentation and organization of the condominium so everything is legal, orderly, and traceable.
services.contentAdminBullet1: Organization of general meetings and protocols
services.contentAdminBullet4: Drafting and archiving contracts and resolutions
services.contentFinanceIntro: Transparent charges, traceable payments, and clear reports for each apartment – no disputes or misunderstandings.
services.contentFinanceBullet3: Monthly/annual reports by entrance and building
services.contentFinanceBullet4: Notifications for arrears and accumulated debts
services.contentMaintenanceIntro: Repairs and preventive maintenance without the chaos – we organize, control, and document everything for the common areas.
services.contentMaintenanceBullet4: Coordination of emergencies and service visits
services.contentCleaningIntro: Clean entrance and common areas on a clear schedule — with quality control and resident feedback.
services.contentCleaningBullet4: Flexible schedules according to building needs

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Last updated: 2026 (placeholder text – replace with your actual policy)
privacy.sec1Desc: This Privacy Policy describes how DomUnity ("we", "us", "Platform") collects, uses and protects personal data when using the website and the client portal.
privacy.sec2Desc: The Data Controller is the organization/person providing the DomUnity service for a specific building/entrance. Depending on the implementation method, your building manager may have the role of administrator/joint administrator regarding certain data.
privacy.sec3Li1: Identification data: name, email, phone (if provided).
privacy.sec3Li2: Property data: building/entrance/apartment, client number (if applicable).
privacy.sec3Li3: Profile data: login/activity history, settings and access rights.
privacy.sec3Li4: Financial data: charges and payments (within the portal functionalities).
privacy.sec3Li5: Communication: alerts, messages, requests and correspondence with the administrator.
privacy.sec3Li6: Technical data: IP address, device/browser type, security logs.
privacy.sec4Title: 4. What we use the data for
privacy.sec4Li1: To provide and maintain the service (portal, reports, notifications).
privacy.sec4Li2: To identify and manage access to profiles and information.
privacy.sec4Li3: For communication on alerts, requests and administrative processes.
privacy.sec4Li4: To improve security and prevent abuse.
privacy.sec4Li5: To comply with legal obligations (if applicable).
privacy.sec5Desc: We process personal data on the basis of: contract/service performance, legal obligations, legitimate interest (e.g. security), as well as consent (e.g. for newsletter), where applicable.
privacy.sec6Desc: Data is stored for a period necessary to provide the service and/or comply with legal obligations. Upon termination of the service, data may be archived or deleted according to the agreed terms and applicable laws.
privacy.sec7Desc: We may share data only when necessary: with the building manager/administrator of the specific building, with hosting/maintenance providers (as processors), or under a legal requirement by competent authorities.
privacy.sec8Li1: Right of access to your personal data.
privacy.sec8Li2: Right to rectification of inaccurate data.
privacy.sec8Li3: Right to erasure ("to be forgotten") - when applicable.
privacy.sec8Li4: Right to restriction of processing - under certain conditions.
privacy.sec8Li5: Right to object to processing based on legitimate interest.
privacy.sec8Li6: Right to data portability - when applicable.
privacy.sec8Li7: Right to withdraw consent (e.g., for newsletter) when processing is based on consent.
privacy.sec9Desc: We apply technical and organizational measures to protect data (access control, security logs, encryption in transit, etc.), but no system can guarantee 100% security.
privacy.sec10Desc: The Platform may use cookies and similar technologies for functionality, security and improving the user experience. (Add your actual cookie policy if you use one.)
privacy.sec11Desc1: For questions regarding this Privacy Policy, contact us:
privacy.sec11Desc2: You can also review the Terms and Conditions here:
privacy.smallprint: * This text is a placeholder and not legal advice. For an actual policy, consult a lawyer and a GDPR specialist.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Last updated: 2026 (placeholder text - replace with your actual terms)
terms.sec1Desc: These Terms and Conditions govern the rules for access and use of the DomUnity platform ("Platform"), including the client portal, public pages and communication functionalities between the administrator (building manager) and users (residents/owners).
terms.sec2Li1Desc: – a person who uses the platform.
terms.sec2Li2Desc: – building manager/authorized person who manages data and access.
terms.sec2Li3Desc: – object of management in the platform.
terms.sec3Desc: Access to the client portal can be granted by the Administrator after verification of identity/affiliation to a specific condominium. The user is responsible for keeping their login credentials secure.
terms.sec4Desc: The Platform may provide: review of charges and payments, notifications, submitting alerts, access to documents and reports, as well as other functionalities according to the agreed services for the specific building.
terms.sec5Li1: To provide accurate and up-to-date data.
terms.sec5Li2: Not to abuse the functionalities (spam, attempts at unauthorized access, etc.).
terms.sec5Li3: To maintain the confidentiality of login credentials.
terms.sec6Desc: DomUnity makes efforts for correct operation and security, but does not guarantee uninterrupted availability. DomUnity is not responsible for interruptions caused by force majeure, internet providers or external services.
terms.sec7Desc1: The processing of personal data is carried out in accordance with the Privacy Policy. We recommend that you familiarize yourself with it.
terms.sec8Desc: DomUnity may update these Terms and Conditions upon changes in functionality, legislation or services. The current version is published on this page.
terms.sec9Desc: For questions regarding the Terms and Conditions, contact us:
terms.smallprint: * This text is a placeholder and not legal advice. For actual terms and conditions, consult a lawyer.

footer.newsletterTitle: Subscribe for the latest news and useful tips
footer.faqA1: DomUnity combines professional building management with an online platform for transparent reports, alerts, and communication with residents.
footer.faqQ2: What does the building manager service include?
footer.faqA2: Administrative management, financial services, organization of repairs/maintenance, and coordination with suppliers according to agreed services.
footer.faqA3: Yes — every apartment has access to charges, payments, and reports (according to system rights).
footer.faqQ4: How do I report a problem?
footer.faqA4: Through your profile in the client portal (or via direct contact with the administrator, if you prefer).
